releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 未完成的流行实验，Lil Nas X 再掀话题
releasedToday.highlightEn: Unfinished pop experiment, Lil Nas X stirs conversation again
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 的新作《DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)》以未完成形态发布，充满实验性和话题性，延续了他打破常规的风格。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X's 'DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)' is released in an unfinished form, full of experimentation and buzz, continuing his boundary-breaking style.

releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.highlight: Kendrick Lamar 重磅回归，KL7 引爆全球期待
releasedToday.highlightEn: Kendrick Lamar makes a massive return, KL7 ignites global anticipation
releasedToday.summary: Kendrick Lamar 的全新专辑《KL7》是年度最受瞩目的嘻哈作品之一，深度叙事与社会洞察再度定义流派高度。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Kendrick Lamar's new album 'KL7' is one of the most anticipated hip-hop releases of the year, redefining the genre with deep storytelling and social insight.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 现场录音，再现 Richmond 夏夜
releasedToday.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band live recording, recreating a Richmond summer night
releasedToday.summary: 《Warehouse 2026》收录 Dave Matthews Band 在里士满的完整现场，音色温暖，氛围自由，适合乐迷回味。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'Warehouse 2026' captures Dave Matthews Band's full live set in Richmond, with warm sound and free-spirited vibes, perfect for fans.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.highlight: Schiller 的电子幻境，氛围与旋律的完美融合
releasedToday.highlightEn: Schiller's electronic dreamscape, a perfect blend of atmosphere and melody
releasedToday.summary: 《Euphoria》延续 Schiller 标志性的电子氛围风格，旋律优美且富有沉浸感，适合冥想或深夜聆听。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'Euphoria' continues Schiller's signature electronic ambient style, with beautiful melodies and immersive soundscapes, ideal for meditation or late-night listening.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: Don McLean 1975 年现场，经典重现
releasedToday.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 live recording, a classic revisited
releasedToday.summary: 《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》记录了 Don McLean 七十年代的经典现场，声音质朴，情感真挚，是民谣爱好者的宝藏。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' captures Don McLean's classic 70s live performance, with raw sound and sincere emotion, a treasure for folk lovers.

releasedToday.title: Venice
releasedToday.artist: Orchestra of the Royal Opera House, Covent Garden, Sir Georg Solti
releasedToday.highlight: Solti 指挥的威尼斯之声，古典瑰宝
releasedToday.highlightEn: Solti conducts the sound of Venice, a classical gem
releasedToday.summary: Sir Georg Solti 与皇家歌剧院管弦乐团演绎《威尼斯》，华丽而细腻，是古典乐迷不可错过的录音。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Sir Georg Solti and the Orchestra of the Royal Opera House present 'Venice', luxurious and delicate, a must-hear for classical music lovers.
